name: @nebutra/tokens
description: Unified theme tokens and theme-provider entry for Nebutra apps

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'),src='../design-tokens/build/css/styles.generated.css';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,'./styles.css');console.log('styles.css refreshed from @nebutra/design-tokens')}else{console.log('styles.css kept (committed copy used; design-tokens build/ absent — likely Turbo cache restore without files)')}"
